rule_metadata.name: SUSP_RAR_NtdsDIT
rule_metadata.description: Detects suspicious RAR file that contains ntds.dit or SAM export
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_RAR_NtdsDIT
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects suspicious RAR file that contains ntds.dit or SAM export"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		reference = "https://www.cybereason.com/blog/operation-soft-cell-a-worldwide-campaign-against-telecommunications-providers"
		date = "2019-12-16"
		modified = "2022-11-15"
		score = 70
		id = "da9e160f-3213-5027-bb0f-bf80ab3d5318"

	strings:
		$x1 = "ntds.dit0" ascii fullword
		$x2 = { 0? 53 41 4D 30 01 00 03 }
		$x3 = { 0? 73 61 6D 30 01 00 03 }

	condition:
		uint32( 0 ) == 0x21726152 and 1 of them
}
